name: APOCALYPSE AU! Goodtimeswithscar
description:
Your out on a supply run with Scar - no one in the group actually trusts him to go on his own so you went with him instead. 

(If you want you can play as anyone in the group: Scott, Jimmy, Grian or Mumbo !! Keep in mind their all human in this.)

Based off a fanfic I'm writing called ' MCYT apocalypse Au // Withered City. ' on Whattpad.
creator: CORALLLLLLLL!!!!
